'''Onyeth Canavar''' was a [[Tarnab/Legends|Tarnab]] [[Gender/Legends|male]]<ref name="CSWE" /> who roamed the alleys<ref name="Tarnab" /> and visited the streets of the [[Uscru Entertainment District/Legends|Uscru Entertainment District]] of<ref name="CSWE" /> the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="Inside">''[[Inside the Worlds of Star Wars: Attack of the Clones]]''</ref> [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="CSWE" /> During a [[Local day/Legends|night]] on Coruscant<ref name="AotC" /> in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]],<ref name="Date">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the events of {{Film|II}} to [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].</ref> the Tarnab wandered along<ref name="Insider" /> [[Vos Gesal Street/Legends|Vos Gesal Street]]<ref name="Inside" /> in the district with<ref name="AotC" /> the [[Human/Legends|Human]] partier [[Kristoff Vestswe]].<ref name="Rogues Gallery">{{InsiderCite|136|Rogues Gallery|Rogues Gallery: A Night at the Outlander Club}}</ref> As they did so, the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] caught up with the fellow Jedi [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] at the [[Outlander Club/Legends|Outlander Club]],<ref name="AotC" /> a [[Nightclub/Legends|nightclub]] and [[Gambling/Legends|gambling]] hall.<ref name="CSWE2">{{CSWECite|II|431|Outlander Club}}</ref> Canavar later walked into the club, alone, and stood near the entrance while Kenobi drank at the club's bar.<ref name="AotC" />

During<ref name="AotC" /> his<ref name="Insider" /> night on Coruscant, Canavar wore a [[Color/Legends|gray]] [[Jumpsuit/Legends|jumpsuit]].<ref name="AotC" /> The Tarnab had brown skin, blue [[Eye/Legends|eyes]], and brown [[Hair/Legends|hair]].<ref name="Tarnab" />

==Behind the scenes==
{{Quote|Look for this Tarnab alien wandering out on the street outside the Outlander, but don't be unnerved by his resemblance to a decaying sheep.|Daniel Wallace|<ref name="Insider" />}}
Onyeth Canavar first appeared in the [[2002]] [[prequel trilogy]] film [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'']].<ref name="AotC">{{Film|II}}</ref> The Outlander Club interior scenes including Canavar, who was portrayed by an uncredited extra, were shot at [[Fox Studios, Sydney]] on [[July 17]], [[2000]]. The club's exterior scenes were also shot at the studio.<ref name="365Days">''[[Creating the Worlds of Star Wars: 365 Days]]''</ref> The character was first identified on [[July 15]], [[2003]] through the [[Image Attack]] feature on [[StarWars.com]].<ref name="Tarnab" /> Author [[Daniel Wallace]] stated Canavar had a resemblance to a decaying sheep in "[[Who's Who in the Outlander Club: It's Ladies' Night]]," an article in the [[Star Wars Insider 75|seventy-fifth]] issue of ''[[Star Wars Insider]]''<ref name="Insider" /> published on [[April 6]], [[2004]].<ref name="SW.com">{{SWArchive|url=community/fanclub/mag/news20040315.html|text=The New Face of Evil}}</ref>
